hook: You do not need perfect chemistry on date one to justify date two.
body: Some attraction grows after safety and familiarity rise, especially when both people were a little tense early on.

hook: Men often treat the first date like a final exam when it may really be a rough draft of the dynamic.
body: If the first date had enough warmth and interest, date two can be a better read than your immediate verdict.

body: A slightly nervous but engaged first meeting may lead to a much stronger second date once both people relax.
